channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: The Temper Trap Announce ‘Sungazer,’ Their First Album in a Decade
item.description: 🌟 The Temper Trap is back with ‘Sungazer’! Get ready to groove to their first album in 10 years 🎶 #TemperTrap #Sungazer

item.title: Sincere Engineer announce new LP ‘Probably Claws,’ share “Twist My Tongue”
item.description: 🎸 Rock on! @SincereEngineer's ‘Probably Claws’ LP is coming soon! 🎶 Listen to “Twist My Tongue” now! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Better Than Ezra Launch Contest for Fans to Write New Song with AI
item.description: 🚀 Let's co-write with AI! Join @betterthanezra on this musical adventure 🎶 #InnovativeCollab #SongwritingFun

item.title: Shakira Announces Las Mujeres Ya No Lloran U.S. Arena Tour
item.description: 🎉 Shake it with Shakira! Las Mujeres Ya No Lloran U.S. Arena Tour coming soon! 💃 #ShakiraTourDates

item.title: Weezer’s Back ‘Again’ With New Single
item.description: Weezer strikes again! 🎸🎶 Get ready to rock out to their catchy new single! #Weezer #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Lizzo Reveals She Lost Her Virginity in 2020 After Winning Three Grammys
item.description: 🚨 Lizzo spills the tea on her wild 2020—new music inspiration? 👀🔥 #Grammys #Lizzo #NewMusicWhoDis

item.title: $uicideboy$ Announce 2026 “Grey Day Tour”
item.description: Calling all $uicideboy$ fans! 🎉 Get ready to rock with the "Grey Day Tour" in 2026! 🤘 #Suicideboys #GreyDayTour

item.title: Turnstile and Death Cab for Cutie Top 2026 Bumbershoot Lineup
item.description: Seattle's Bumbershoot just dropped the ultimate lineup 🔥 Who's ready for Turnstile and Death Cab for Cutie?! 🎶 #Bumbershoot2026

item.title: Mad Honey Announce New Album Bridge Over Cumberland: Hear Two Songs
item.description: 🍯🎶 Dive into a sweet new sound with Mad Honey's upcoming album 'Bridge Over Cumberland'! 🌉🎵 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Billy Strings Sets Fall 2026 U.S. Tour
item.description: 🍂 Billy Strings is hitting the road this fall! Who's joining the jam-packed adventure? 🎸 #BillyStringsTour2026
